summary: AMK-selectable creative and product pipeline modes. Build plans and review bundles are internal artefacts; public, pricing, legal, and deploy lanes require human gates.
global_laws: Blueprint does not equal product claim.
Build plan does not equal execution.
Creative output does not equal legal approval.
Public launch requires AMK or human approval.
Pricing requires Z-SUSBV and entitlement review.
No API or provider calls in this phase.

supported_workbench_modes.purpose: Internal motion and trailer planning: narrative, shots, audio briefs, and safety framing before spend.

required_evidence.description: Clearance plan or placeholder budget for music, stock, talent, and clips.
On-screen claims sourced or marked fictional.
Checklist excluding AGI, infinite power, and uncited superlatives from public-facing cuts.

safety_gates: No autonomous deploy language in production binders

supported_workbench_modes.purpose: Multi-channel campaign brief with evidence-first claims and AMK-gated external launch.

required_evidence.description: Each customer-facing claim mapped to proof or softened copy.
Price or tier language checked against entitlement catalog posture.
AMK indicators advisory pass before public launch.

safety_gates: AMK owner for pricing or billing copy
blocked_without_human_gate: Live SKU or checkout string changes
Press release with forward-looking financial statements

supported_workbench_modes.purpose: Single-product landing narrative and structure plan for engineering and design hand-off.

required_evidence.description: Dated captures or demo plan tied to current build.
Data collected on page matches published privacy posture.
If prices shown, values verified against authoritative source with owner initials.

safety_gates: No medical or therapeutic claims without licensed review
No child-specific targeting without policy path
No API keys or secrets in mock HTML
recommended_verification: Web readiness script for the target app when applicable

supported_workbench_modes.purpose: Long-form instructional or narrative PDF planning with versioning and export hygiene.
required_inputs: Tooling versions the doc must match

required_evidence.description: Subject-matter owner sign-off on safety- or data-affecting procedures.
Embedded product versions match release manifest.
Third-party figures and quotes correctly attributed.

safety_gates: No instructions that bypass security controls
No forbidden active content in PDF where policy forbids
recommended_verification: npm run verify:md on extracted markdown if used

supported_workbench_modes.purpose: Internal prototype plan for tools or dashboards: flows, data boundaries, and risk class before tickets.
required_inputs: Data classes touched (PII, payment, health, none)

required_evidence.description: Written classification for each field shown or stored.
Short abuse case list for operator review.
AMK indicators referenced as advisory only, not permission.

safety_gates: No silent cross-project data bridges in mockups
No billing side-effects in prototype narrative
Charter note if future external API is contemplated
recommended_verification: npm run z:car2 when overlapping code exists
npm run dashboard:registry-verify when dashboard files change

supported_workbench_modes.purpose: Composer or library brief with mood, tempo, stems, and clearance path.
output_assets: Reference playlist index (IDs not files if rights uncertain)

required_evidence.description: Library or composer agreement status recorded.
Sonic palette constraints from brand doc if any.
If audio carries UX meaning, note captions or rhythm for accessibility.

safety_gates: No uncleared samples in shipped mixes
blocked_without_human_gate: Broadcast or festival sync without license

supported_workbench_modes.purpose: Partner or investor pack outline with traction, risk, and disciplined language; not securities advice.

required_evidence.description: Each traction number has dated source export or file.
Forward-looking or securities-sensitive language screened by counsel when required.
Live versus planned features labeled; no AGI or infinite-power slides.

safety_gates: No misstatement of charter or bridge posture
Pricing slides align with policy metadata only
recommended_verification: npm run z:susbv when commercial numbers appear
